metadata.title: Double Dutch Bus
metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.77] Give me a HO if you've got your funky bus fare... HO HO HO
[00:16.15] There's a double dutch bus comin' down the street
[00:20.26] Moving pretty fast
[00:21.50] So kinda shuffle your feet
[00:24.37] Get on the bus and pay your fare
[00:27.63] And tell the driver that you're
[00:29.30] Goin' to a Double Dutch Affair
[00:31.87] Fe Fi Fo Fum
[00:34.25] Well I'll be darn here it comes
[00:36.22] The Double Dutch Bus is on the street
[00:38.00] You'd better get off the curb
[00:39.16] Move your feet
[00:40.31] Bus fare trans-pass
[00:42.37] That's the way my money lasts
[00:44.11] Ain't got no car to get around
[00:46.26] When I go to work I've gotta go downtown
[00:48.18] Now I've missed my train
[00:49.29] That's a darn shame
[00:50.27] When I'm running late no sleep's to blame
[00:52.10] If you've gotta wife you know I'm right
[00:54.13] Gotta special man well I can understand
[00:56.81] Uptown, downtown everybody's getting down
[01:00.21] Say uptown say downtown
[01:04.28] Well I've missed my bus I know I'm late
[01:06.30] I've gotta do something I know I hate
[01:08.06] I'm gonna walk to work fifteen blocks
[01:10.35] I already got a hole in my socks
[01:12.25] Go ahead and laugh that's okay
[01:14.15] Cause what I really wanna say
[01:16.08] I got bad feet my corns hurt
[01:18.32] To top it off I'm late for work
[01:20.32] Let me tell you what I say
[01:21.24] When I'm dealing with the funky sidewalk
[01:24.28] Let me show you how to walk
[01:25.33] When I gotta do my funky walk
[01:28.20] Let me tell you what I say
[01:29.22] When I'm dealing with the funky sidewalk
[01:31.83] I say, sssshh-sugar
[01:35.08] Hilzi, gilzirls! Yilzall hilzave t' milzove ilzout the wilzay silzo the gilzuys can plilzay bilzasket-bilzall
[01:52.37] I say wizzat? Nizzo-izzo wizzay
[01:57.05] Yizzall bizzetter mizzove
[01:58.39] I say wizzat? Willze illzain't millzovin'
[02:09.03] Shillzu-gillzar! Bilzzaby
[02:09.17] Willze illzare plizzayin' dizzouble dizzutch
[02:10.27] Dizzouble dizzutch
[02:12.33] 
[02:15.65] Dizzouble dizzutch
[02:15.65] Willze illzare plizzayin' dizzouble dizzutch
[02:18.15] Dizzouble dizzutch
[02:18.24] Dizzouble dizzutch
[02:20.30] 
[02:25.00] Millze cillzan sillzome plilzay dilzzouble dilzutch
[02:27.18] 
[02:29.46] Hilzzoo?
[02:29.47] My gizzirl
[02:30.01] Brillzing her izzin
[02:34.99] Izzo kizzay
[02:35.05] Izzall rizzight
[02:35.11] Izzo kizzay
[02:35.93] Izzall rizzight! Nizzow wizzee wilzzo-izzo-zee
[02:40.24] 
[03:12.91] Bip, bomp, bam alakazam
[03:16.67] But only when you're grooving
[03:18.49] With the Double Dutch Man
[03:20.99] Put on your skates don't forget your rope
[03:24.59] Cause I know I'm gonna see you
[03:26.52] At my Double Dutch Show
[03:28.73] Rebecca, Lolita, Veshawn and Dawn
[03:32.58] Everytime you do the Double Dutch you really turn it on
[03:38.25] Bilzarbra, Mitzery, Milzetty, Kilsan
[03:40.37] 
[03:43.54] Titzommy, Kitzerrance, Kilzommy that's my man
[03:44.60] Come on get on my Double Dutch Bus
[03:50.19] (The Double Dutch Bus)
[04:24.42] Let me hear you say do that
[04:26.08] (Do that)
[04:28.55] Let me hear you say Do that again
[04:31.52] (Do that again)
[04:32.41] Let me hear you say do the do
[04:35.32] Do the do
[04:36.59] Let me hear you say do the do the do
[04:38.37] Do the do the do
[04:40.05] Do the do, do do do do do
[04:42.94] Do the do, do do do do do
